{% import "macros.html" as macros %} {% block title %}{{ config.title }}{% endblock title %} {% include "_vars.html" %} {% set normalize_css = get_url(path="css/normalize.css", cachebust=true) %} {% set main_css = get_url(path="css/main.css", cachebust=true) %} {% set dsl_catalog = load_data(path="data/dsl.yml") %}
{{ config.extra.logo_name }}
{% block slogan %}{% endblock slogan %}
{% for menu in config.extra.extra_menu %} {{ menu.title }} {% endfor %}
{% if config.extra.extra_menu | length > 0 %}
{% for menu in config.extra.extra_menu %} {{ menu.title }} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% set docs_section = get_section(path="_index.md") %} {% if page %} {{ macros::nav_tree(docs_section=docs_section, current_page=page) }} {% else %} {{ macros::nav_tree(docs_section=docs_section) }} {% endif %}
{% block hero %}{% endblock hero %}
{% block toc %} {% set docs_section = get_section(path="_index.md") %} {{ macros::toc_nav(docs_section=docs_section) }} {% endblock toc %}
{% block content %} {{ section.content | safe }} {% endblock content %}
